note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Burn Left upper arm measures aprx 5.8 x 2.6cm, depth 0.1cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 3.5x1.6, 0.1cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.

Wound note - Leftupperarm. Meas 5.8x2.6x0.1cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 53% gran, 47% slough. Periwound macerated. Collagen dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Kim notified.
